rationale: Adds a 6-line documentation paragraph to Development.md describing how to configure OpenAI-compatible gateways: gateway base URL as the custom base URL, the gateway-issued API key, and a model alias, with a concrete Tuning Engines example (https://api.tuningengines.com/v1, sk-te-... key shape). The PR body explicitly states this is docs-only with no runtime behavior changes. Insertion is contained to a single hunk between the existing 'Settings UI' paragraph and the 'headless or CLI workflows' bash block; no code, tests, or assertions touched.
